programme.title: Criminal Minds
programme.desc: The team tracks a suspect who shares the same style as a serial killer from 30 years ago; someone tracks the BAU's cases and replicates crimes.

programme.desc: Sgt. Parker is forced to confront his feelings about his child when a desperate man at a hospital holds doctors at gunpoint until his dying daughter gets a new heart.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: An innocent bystander creates complications for the team when he stumbles into the middle of a drug bust.

programme.desc: Robin and Dennis hail the cab, and they are ready to play!

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Separately, Will and Ivy share their opinions with Electra; Ridge reminds R.J. not to bring his personal life to the office.

programme.title: etalk

programme.title: MasterChef Canada
programme.desc: Its time vs. ingredients as the Top nine home cooks race for chicken cuts in a high stakes challenge where only one can rule the roost.

programme.title: TMZ Live
programme.desc: A candid look at how the gossip site operates, bringing viewers into the site's newsroom, where the daily chats take place; viewers present their opinions on the featured topics through social media, phone calls and video chat.

programme.desc: Baked treats using unexpected florals.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: When four guys hail a cab after dinner at a trendy Eglinton pub, the last thing they expect is to end up on a quiz show; once they're in the cash cab, the last thing this bunch expects is to be kicked out.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Two brothers try to impress their gorgeous friend with their cash cab wits; but it's possible it will be Marcia who will be the impressive one, all the way to their destination.
